Sonia Gandhi - Will she be India’s PM? –
Wednesday, 27 August, 2003, 12:38
The Nehru family has ruled Independent India for most number of years, and now the
eyes are on Ms Sonia Gandhi, whether she will make it to the PM’s seat and continue
the legacy, in spite of her having an Italian origin!
Here we analyze her chart, to get an insight into her past, present and future..
